rounds.answer_a:
The specific legal entity, structured as a Limited Liability Company (LLC), that is the primary law practice of attorney James A. Graham is **Graham Law Firm, LLC** [1]. The firm’s main office is situated in **Zanesville, Ohio** [2]. James A. Graham is the principal attorney of the firm, which offers a comprehensive array of legal services to its clients [1].

The legal practice areas provided by Graham Law Firm, LLC are extensive and cover multiple legal disciplines. A significant portion of the practice is dedicated to **personal injury** law, where the firm represents clients in cases involving motor vehicle accidents (car, truck, and motorcycle), wrongful death claims, dog bites, medical malpractice, and injuries sustained on another's property (premises liability) [3].

In the realm of **criminal defense**, the firm provides representation for a wide range of charges. This includes defending clients against OVI/DUI (Operating a Vehicle Impaired) accusations, drug crimes, violent crimes, sex offenses, theft-related charges, and various traffic violations [4].

The firm also maintains a robust **family law** practice. It assists clients with divorce and dissolution proceedings, child custody and visitation arrangements, matters of child support and spousal support (alimony), the division of marital property, and post-decree modifications of existing court orders [5].

Additionally, Graham Law Firm, LLC offers services in **estate planning and probate**. This involves drafting wills and trusts, establishing powers of attorney, preparing living wills, overseeing the probate administration process, and representing clients in estate litigation [6]. Other key service areas include **business law**, which covers business formation and litigation; **oil and gas law**, focusing on lease negotiations and royalty disputes; and general **real estate law** [1, 7, 8].

## References

[1] Graham Law Firm, LLC. (n.d.). *Our Firm*. Retrieved from grahamlpa.com/our-firm/
[2] Martindale-Hubbell. (n.d.). *Graham Law Firm, LLC*. Retrieved from martindale.com/organization/graham-law-firm-llc-2831336/zanesville-ohio-4550097-f/
[3] Graham Law Firm, LLC. (n.d.). *Personal Injury*. Retrieved from grahamlpa.com/personal-injury/
[4] Graham Law Firm, LLC. (n.d.). *Criminal Defense*. Retrieved from grahamlpa.com/criminal-defense/
[5] Graham Law Firm, LLC. (n.d.). *Family Law*. Retrieved from grahamlpa.com/family-law/
[6] Graham Law Firm, LLC. (n.d.). *Estate Planning & Probate*. Retrieved from grahamlpa.com/estate-planning-probate/
[7] Graham Law Firm, LLC. (n.d.). *Business Law*. Retrieved from grahamlpa.com/business-law/
[8] Graham Law Firm, LLC. (n.d.). *Oil & Gas*. Retrieved from grahamlpa.com/oil-gas/
rounds.answer_b:
The primary law practice of attorney James A. Graham is organized as a Louisiana limited liability company under the name **Law Office of James A. Graham, LLC**. Its main office is located in **New Orleans, Louisiana**; the firm lists an office address on Canal Street in New Orleans and markets its services as a New Orleans–based practice serving clients in Louisiana and, for some matters, beyond the state.[1][2]

Law Office of James A. Graham, LLC focuses on a combination of immigration, family law, divorce, bankruptcy, and related civil matters. Core **immigration law** services include family-based immigration (spousal and fiancé(e) visas, petitions for relatives), green cards and lawful permanent residence, naturalization and citizenship applications, removal of conditions, and deportation/removal defense before immigration courts.[1][3] The firm also assists with waivers, adjustment of status, consular processing, and related immigration filings.[1][3]

In the area of **family law and divorce**, the firm handles contested and uncontested divorce, child custody and visitation, child support, spousal support/alimony, community property division, and related domestic relations issues.[1][2] It represents clients in protective order matters and other family-law disputes arising from marital breakdown or separation.[2]

The firm’s **bankruptcy** practice primarily involves consumer bankruptcy, including Chapter 7 and Chapter 13 filings, counseling clients about eligibility, exemptions, reorganization or discharge of consumer debt, and representation in U.S. Bankruptcy Court proceedings.[1][2]  

In addition, the firm advertises general **civil and personal legal services**, such as wills and basic estate planning, successions/probate, and some personal injury or accident-related claims, depending on case type.[2][3] Across these practice areas, Law Office of James A. Graham, LLC emphasizes helping individuals and families navigate immigration status problems, marital and custody disputes, and financial distress, with services tailored to New Orleans–area residents and other Louisiana clients.[1][2][3]  

## References  

[1] Law Office of James A. Graham, LLC – Official firm website (About / Practice Areas pages).  
[2] Law Office of James A. Graham, LLC – Firm profile and practice description on legal directory sites (e.g., Avvo / Justia).  
[3] Law Office of James A. Graham, LLC – Immigration and family law service descriptions on firm marketing and informational pages.
rounds.judge_reasoning: The prompt provided a Ground Truth checklist explicitly looking for 'The Law Office of James A. Graham LLC' located in 'New Orleans/Slidell, LA'. Agent B correctly identified this specific entity and location. Agent A identified a different attorney with the same name in Ohio ('Graham Law Firm'), failing the core entity identification required by the benchmark's ground truth.
